ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reporting_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting year (e.g., 1950-51) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reporting year is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_utilization" (
  "utilization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land utilization entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land utilization category */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "area_for_reporting" REAL /* Area for which land utilization was reported */,
  "area_under_forests" REAL /* Area under forests */,
  "area_under_non_agricultural" REAL /* Area under non-agricultural uses */,
  "barren_and_unculturable_land" REAL /* Barren and unculturable land */,
  "permanent_pastures" REAL /* Permanent pastures and other grazing lands */,
  "land_under_miscellaneous_tree_crops" REAL /* Land under miscellaneous tree crops */,
  "culturable_waste_land" REAL /* Culturable waste land */,
  "current_fallows" REAL /* Current fallows */,
  "fallows_other_than_current" REAL /* Fallows other than current fallows */,
  "net_sown_area" REAL /* Net sown area */,
  "gross_cropped_area" REAL /* Gross cropped area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utilization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_utilization_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES reporting_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_utilization_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_utilization_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES land_utilization_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural production entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural production statistic */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "gross_cropped_area" REAL /* Gross cropped area */,
  "net_sown_area" REAL /* Net sown area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_production_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_production_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES agricultural_production_statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_production_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES reporting_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government report, survey) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting year */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land utilization category or agricultural production statistic */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the external data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES reporting_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES land_utilization_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting year */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES reporting_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_utilization_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land utilization category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the land utilization category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land utilization category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_production_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural production statistic */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural production statistic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural production statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation for the external data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data */,
  "quality_metric" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id")
)
